description: The Legacy Tube Spiral Mesh Adapter component is used to convert legacy content for tube spiral meshes into current content.

fields.UpwardTrend: The original float value for UpwardTrend.
fields.EndPoint: The value field for the EndPoint of the Component:TubeSpiralMesh.
fields.CoilCount: The value field for the CoilCount of the Component:TubeSpiralMesh.

usage: Used in legacy content. do not use in new content.
